summary: Iteration 54: Verified geofence radius change from 10m to 50m default (configurable), email_status field in staff creation response, and geofence radius input in Settings > Business Info. All 7 backend tests passed. Frontend verified geofence_radius input field exists with correct value (50m) and email status toast displays correctly.

issues: Helper text says 'Staff must clock in within 10m' but geofence is now 50m - text should be updated to match configurable radius

action_items: Update helper text in RestaurantSettings.js line 468 from '10m' to match the configurable geofence_radius value
critical_code_review_comments: attendance.py line 69: _check_geofence reads biz_info.get('geofence_radius', DEFAULT_GEOFENCE_RADIUS) - correctly uses configurable value
attendance.py line 72: Error message correctly shows actual radius: f'within {radius}m'
staff.py lines 64-81: email_status field correctly returned in create staff response
RestaurantSettings.js line 34: formData includes geofence_radius: 50 default
RestaurantSettings.js line 461: geofence-radius-input field exists with data-testid
RestaurantSettings.js lines 229-233: email_status toast handling implemented correctly
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted TEST_email_* users for email status testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 54 verified: (1) Geofence radius is now 50m default instead of 10m. (2) Geofence is configurable per restaurant via business_info.geofence_radius. (3) Clock-me at 30m succeeds (within 50m), clock-me at 80m fails with correct error message mentioning 50m. (4) Staff creation returns email_status field (sent/failed/skipped). (5) Frontend shows email status toast after staff creation. (6) Settings > Business Info has geofence_radius input field with data-testid='geofence-radius-input'. (7) Minor issue: helper text still says '10m' but should match configurable radius.

geofence_30m_succeeds.evidence: Backend test passed: POST /api/attendance/clock-me with 30m offset returns 200

geofence_80m_fails.evidence: Backend test passed: POST /api/attendance/clock-me with 80m offset returns 403 with '50m' in error message

geofence_uses_db_radius.evidence: Backend test passed: GET /api/restaurants/my returns business_info.geofence_radius=50

geofence_radius_configurable.evidence: Backend test passed: PUT /api/restaurants/my/settings can update geofence_radius

email_status_in_response.evidence: Backend test passed: POST /api/restaurant/staff returns email_status field

geofence_radius_input_exists.evidence: Frontend test: data-testid='geofence-radius-input' found with value=50

email_status_toast.evidence: Frontend screenshot shows toast 'Welcome email sent to TEST_email_*@test-invalid.local'
